---
title: "Soft Sensors for Energy Consumption in Topographic Uncertainty Propagation"
author: "Eren Edgü <br> Alan Correa"
institute: "Chair of Methods for Model-based Development in Computational Engineering"
date: "2026-06-01"
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
format: 
  revealjs:
    width: 1280
    height: 720
    center-title-slide: false
    theme: default
    transition: fade
    slide-number: true
---

## Table of Contents

<style>
/* 1. HIDE FOOTER LINE AND SLIDE NUMBER ON TITLE SLIDE (Keep Logo) */
.reveal:has(section.quarto-title-block.present)::before,
.reveal:has(section.quarto-title-block.present) .slide-number {
  display: none !important;
}

/* 2. TITLE SLIDE STYLING */
.reveal:has(section.quarto-title-block.present) {
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #0052a3 30%, white 30%) !important;
}

.reveal .slides section.quarto-title-block {
  top: 0 !important;
  transform: none !important; 
  display: flex !important;
  flex-direction: column !important;
  justify-content: flex-start !important;
  text-align: left !important;
  height: 100vh !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
}

.reveal .slides section.quarto-title-block h1.title {
  margin-top: 240px !important; 
  margin-left: -10px !important; 
  margin-bottom: 15px !important; 
  color: #0052a3 !important;
  font-size: 1.3em !important; 
  font-weight: bold !important;
  line-height: 1.1;
  text-align: left !important;
  width: 90%; 
}

/* --- METADATA LAYOUT & UNIFORM FONT --- */
.reveal .slides section.quarto-title-block .quarto-title-authors,
.reveal .slides section.quarto-title-block .institute,
.reveal .slides section.quarto-title-block .quarto-title-meta,
.reveal .slides section.quarto-title-block .date {
  margin-left: -10px !important; 
  margin-top: 5px !important;
  margin-bottom: 0 !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  display: block !important;
  text-align: left !important;
  color: #000 !important;
  font-size: 28px !important;
  font-weight: 400 !important;
  line-height: 1.3 !important;
  visibility: visible !important;
}

.reveal .slides section.quarto-title-block .quarto-title-meta {
  display: block !important;
}

.reveal .slides section.quarto-title-block .quarto-title-authors *,
.reveal .slides section.quarto-title-block .institute *,
.reveal .slides section.quarto-title-block .quarto-title-meta *,
.reveal .slides section.quarto-title-block .date * {
  font-size: inherit !important;
  color: inherit !important;
  font-weight: inherit !important;
  line-height: inherit !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
}

.reveal .slides section.quarto-title-block .quarto-title-meta-heading {
  display: none !important;
}

/* 3. GLOBAL FOOTER & LOGO */
.reveal::after {
  content: "";
  position: fixed;
  bottom: 25px;
  right: 35px;
  width: 440px;
  height: 110px;
  background-image: url('mbd_logo.svg');
  background-size: contain;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-position: right bottom;
  pointer-events: none;
  z-index: 1000;
}

.reveal::before {
  content: "";
  position: fixed;
  bottom: 120px;
  left: 50px;
  right: 50px;
  height: 1px;
  background-color: #323232;
  z-index: 100;
}

.slide-number {
  left: 45px !important;
  bottom: 80px !important;
  right: auto !important;
  font-size: 18px !important;
  color: #4a4a4a !important;
}

.slide-number::after {
  content: "Soft Sensors for Energy Consumption in Topographic Uncertainty Propagation | Eren Edgü, Alan Correa | MBD Chair";
  position: fixed;
  bottom: 85px;
  left: 200px;
  font-size: 18px;
  color: #4a4a4a !important;
  white-space: nowrap;
  z-index: 999;
}

/* 4. CONTENT SLIDE ALIGNMENT */
.reveal .slides section:not(.quarto-title-block) {
  text-align: left !important;
  margin-left: -10px !important; 
  width: 100% !important; 
}

.reveal .slides section:not(.quarto-title-block) h1,
.reveal .slides section:not(.quarto-title-block) h2 {
  text-align: left !important;
  margin-left: 0 !important;
  padding-left: 0 !important; 
}

.reveal .slides section:not(.quarto-title-block) ul,
.reveal .slides section:not(.quarto-title-block) ol {
  text-align: left !important;
  margin-left: 0 !important;
  padding-left: 1.2em !important; 
}
</style>

* [Introduction](#intro)
* [Motivation](#motivation)
* [Experimental Setup](#setup)
* [Preliminary Results](#results)
* [Conclusion](#conclusion)

## Introduction {#intro}
- What is topographic uncertainty propagation?
- Why is it important for flood simulations?
- Alumet Introduction

## Motivation
- Why measure energy directly?
- CPU time vs ALUMET attributed energy graph

## Experimental Setup {#setup}
- Alumet
- Synxflow
- Monte Carlo
- Ensemble analysis

## Preliminary Results {#results}

## Conclusion {#conclusion}
